title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: JOSEPH CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 401 N Main Street Joseph, OR 97846 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% Federal Poverty Level Hours: Phone Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 9am-1pm; closed Thanksgiving and Christmas, all other holidays 9am-1pm Clinic Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 426-4502 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-4502 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD BOX FOOD - HARVEST SHARE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WINDING WATERS CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPH CLINIC
